_comment: Pre-existing resend.emails.send() bypasses, grandfathered and burning down. Each of these ships UNBRANDED and writes no communication_log row, so it is invisible to the delivery-feedback loop. This list only SHRINKS — delete a file from it as you migrate it to sendEmail({ contentHtml }). A new bypass anywhere else fails CI immediately.
_migration: Recipient-facing (do first — these are the unbranded ones users see): lib/actions/documents.ts, lib/auth/login-notification-email.tsx, lib/auth/security-notification-email.tsx, app/api/team/transfer-ownership/route.ts. Ops/admin-facing (Pleks-branded, needs the platform-org decision — sendEmail requires an orgId + registered templateKey, these have neither): lib/actions/submitContactForm.ts, lib/cron/cronDigest.ts, app/api/cron/check-links/route.ts, app/api/cron/feedback-digest/route.ts, app/api/cron/process-audit-exports/route.ts
